reference_deliverable_behavior: Reads CSV with email column; counts distinct lowercase domains; outputs tab-separated count<TAB>domain sorted (count desc, domain asc); malformed/missing-@ rows skipped; no crash on empty file.
hidden_acceptance_tests: three rows with two foo.com + one bar.org prints '2<TAB>foo.com' then '1<TAB>bar.org'
row with no @ is silently skipped
empty CSV produces empty output, exit 0
